mapper.select: SELECT o.outbound_id AS outboundId, o.work_order_no AS workOrderNo, o.outbound_date AS outboundDate, o.due_date AS dueDate, o.status AS statusCode, CASE WHEN o.status = 'ISSUED' THEN '출고완료' ELSE '미출고' END AS statusDisplay, 1 AS rowNum FROM material_outbound o ORDER BY o.outbound_date DESC LIMIT #{perPageNum} OFFSET #{pageStart}

SELECT wo.order_id AS orderId, wo.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, wo.line_id AS lineId, wo.order_qty AS orderQty, wo.due_date AS dueDate FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_id = wo.product_id WHERE wo.shortage_status = 'NONE' ORDER BY wo.due_date ASC, wo.order_id ASC
SELECT wo.order_id AS workOrderNo, wo.product_id, wo.line_id, wo.due_date FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.order_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT wom.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, wom.required_qty AS requiredQty, IFNULL(SUM(mi.quantity),0) AS stockQty FROM work_order_material wom JOIN material m ON m.material_id = wom.material_id LEFT JOIN material_inventory mi ON mi.material_id = wom.material_id AND (mi.is_discarded = 0 OR mi.is_discarded IS NULL) WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{_parameter} GROUP BY wom.material_id, m.material_name, wom.required_qty

SELECT inventory_id, lot_no, quantity, expiration_date, warehouse_code FROM material_inventory WHERE material_id = #{_parameter} AND quantity > 0 AND (is_discarded = 0 OR is_discarded IS NULL) ORDER BY expiration_date ASC, received_date ASC

SELECT CONCAT('OUT-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(outbound_id, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)),0)+1,3,'0')) FROM material_outbound WHERE outbound_id LIKE CONCAT('OUT-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_outbound( outbound_id, work_order_no, work_order_date, status, handled_by, due_date ) VALUES( #{outbound_id}, #{work_order_no}, (SELECT DATE(created_at) FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{work_order_no}), #{status}, #{handled_by}, #{due_date} )
mapper.select: SELECT due_date FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO material_outbound_item (outbound_item_id, outbound_id, material_id, quantity, lot_no, required_qty) VALUES
(#{row.outbound_item_id}, #{row.outbound_id}, #{row.material_id}, #{row.quantity}, #{row.lot_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{row.required_qty})
mapper.select: SELECT outbound_id AS outboundId, work_order_no AS workOrderNo, outbound_date AS outboundDate, due_date AS dueDate, status, handled_by AS handledBy FROM material_outbound WHERE outbound_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT i.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, i.quantity, i.lot_no AS lotNo FROM material_outbound_item i JOIN material m ON m.material_id = i.material_id WHERE i.outbound_id = #{_parameter}
mapper.update: UPDATE material_inventory mi JOIN material_outbound_item oi ON oi.lot_no = mi.lot_no AND oi.material_id = mi.material_id SET mi.quantity = mi.quantity - oi.quantity WHERE oi.outbound_id = #{_parameter} AND mi.quantity >= oi.quantity
mapper.select: SELECT wo.order_id AS workOrderNo, wo.product_id AS productId, wo.line_id AS lineId, wo.due_date AS dueDate FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.order_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT m.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, wom.required_qty AS requiredQty, m.warehouse_code AS defaultWarehouseCode
FROM work_order_material wom JOIN material m ON m.material_id = wom.material_id
WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY m.material_id
